verses.text: 'The fool hath said in his heart, There is no God,' and such denial breeds corruption and vile deeds. Atheism is first a wish of the heart, then a way of life. To push God out of mind is the root from which all evil grows.

The LORD looks down from heaven and finds all gone astray, none doing good; do the workers of iniquity have no knowledge? Sin has spread to all. Left to ourselves, the whole race turns aside, and only grace can recover us.

The LORD looks down from heaven and finds all gone astray, none doing good; do the workers of iniquity have no knowledge? Sin has spread to all. Left to ourselves, the whole race turns aside, and only grace can recover us.

The LORD looks down from heaven and finds all gone astray, none doing good; do the workers of iniquity have no knowledge? Sin has spread to all. Left to ourselves, the whole race turns aside, and only grace can recover us.

Yet the wicked are seized with sudden fear, for 'God is in the generation of the righteous.' He stands with His people. Though scorned by the world, the godly have a Defender the wicked secretly dread.

Yet the wicked are seized with sudden fear, for 'God is in the generation of the righteous.' He stands with His people. Though scorned by the world, the godly have a Defender the wicked secretly dread.
David longs, 'Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion!' He yearns for God's deliverance. That longing points to Christ, the salvation that has come out of Zion for all His people.
